CHAMAFI

SAVE TOGETHER. GROW TOGETHER.

Africa's traditional savings circles — Chamas, Ajo, Stokvels — supercharged with DeFi yield on Celo. Save in stablecoins. Earn passively. On-chain, forever.

// FEATURE_MODULES

BUILT FOR THE FUTURE OF AFRICA

Every module engineered for the next billion on-chain users.
No compromise. No middlemen.

F-01
◈
SMART CONTRACTS

On-Chain Chamas

Create or join a savings circle with full on-chain transparency. Every contribution, every payout — verifiable on Celo.

F-02
⬡
YIELD PROTOCOL

DeFi Yield Engine

Idle stablecoins auto-rehypothecated into Feather vaults (Morpho-based). Members earn yield while waiting for their payout.

F-03
◉
TOKENIZATION

Chama Token

Each graduated Chama mints its own ERC-20 token and deploys a Uniswap V4 pool. Token holders earn from LP yield + vault yield.

F-04
⬢
AGENTIC AI

AI Chama Agent

ERC-8004 powered agent auto-compounds yield, sends contribution reminders, optimizes treasury, and manages proposals.

F-05
▣
GOVERNANCE

On-Chain Governance

Vote on proposals, elect treasurers, set payout schedules, and manage the Chama treasury — all on-chain, all transparent.

F-06
◆
CELO NATIVE

Stablecoin Native

cUSD and USDC first. No volatility risk for savings. Fee abstraction via Celo means gas in stablecoins — no native token needed.

// PROTOCOL_FLOW

HOW IT WORKS

From circle to on-chain economy in four phases.

◈
PHASE 01LIVE

CREATE CHAMA

Deploy a smart contract for your savings circle. Set members, contribution amount, payout schedule, and cycle duration.

▸ As few as 3 members. As large as 1000. Fully configurable on-chain.
⬡
PHASE 02LIVE

INCUBATION PHASE

Members contribute stablecoins (cUSD/USDC) each cycle. Idle funds auto-deployed to Feather yield vaults — earning while waiting.

▸ Think pump.fun mechanics: early momentum, token launch on graduation.
◉
PHASE 03BUILDING

GRADUATION

When Chama hits graduation threshold, an ERC-20 token is minted and deployed to a Uniswap V4 pool with custom rehypothecation hooks.

▸ V4 hooks ensure all LP idle capital keeps earning yield — compounding forever.
⬢
PHASE 04ROADMAP

EARN & GOVERN

Token holders vote on proposals, elect treasurers, and manage yield strategies. AI agent auto-compounds and optimizes in real-time.

▸ ERC-8004 agent: 24/7, never sleeps, never misses a rebalance.
// MINIPAY_MODULE

LAUNCH IN MINIPAY
Africa-first. Mobile-first.

ChamaFi is purpose-built for Opera MiniPay — the #1 crypto wallet in Africa. Your Chama members are already there. We just give them yield.

◉Auto-connect wallet — zero friction
◈Native cUSD / USDC support
⬡Gas fees in stablecoins via Celo
▣12M+ African users already on MiniPay

// TOKEN_DISTRIBUTION

TOKENOMICS

Designed for sustainability. Community-first distribution. Every token serves the protocol.

Community Savings Pool40%
Backing the yield vaults and Chama treasury
Protocol Treasury20%
Grants, audits, ecosystem growth
Team & Contributors15%
2-year vesting, 6-month cliff
Ecosystem Incentives15%
Rewards for early Chamas and liquidity
Public Sale10%
Launch liquidity and community ownership
